message:
🐛 fix: eliminate all circular chunk dependencies in build (#2979)

58 card components imported from lib/cards barrel (index.ts), creating
circular dependencies between chunks that caused broken execution order
and chunk_load errors in production.

Changes:
- 58 card files: barrel import → direct imports from cardHooks,
  CardComponents, statusColors
- vite.config.ts: move react-reconciler to react-vendor chunk,
  expand markdown-vendor to include full unified ecosystem,
  merge three.js into vendor chunk (shared deps caused circular)

Build now produces zero "circular chunk" and zero "reexported through
module" warnings.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
